source_evidence: Collector found public phone, website, and contact page. Official contact page lists Affordable Monument, LLC at 3250 Emerson Street, Jacksonville, FL 32207, phone (904) 362-0611, and sales(at)affordablemonumentjax.com. Official About page names David & Tani Steedley as founders and describes full-service monument, memorial, mausoleum, engraving, restoration, and cleaning services. Florida Sunbiz lists AFFORDABLE MONUMENT, LLC as active, filed 06/05/2024, at the same Emerson Street address, with David W. Steedley as registered agent and Tani Steedley as Treasurer/authorized person. Public search also surfaced complaint coverage about the Jacksonville business that could not be fetched due access blocking, so outreach should stay manual-review until reputation context is checked.
visible_gap: Contact form, phone, and email are present, but the site is consultation-driven and should separate memorial sales, restoration, and public dedication inquiries; manual review recommended because public search surfaced complaint coverage.
offer_angle: Monument and masonry consultation-path cleanup with reputation review
